name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ The GG Monogram continues to make a modern statement in the new collection. This full-zip wallet is presented in dark grey, featuring the classic interlocking letter pattern with a light and shadow effect for a 3D look. It is equipped with multiple card slots, a bill compartment, and a zip coin pocket, offering a rich and practical interior design.
name_cn:
(With full set of packaging)!!️ The GG Monogram continues to make a modern statement in the new collection. This full-zip wallet is presented in dark grey, featuring the classic interlocking letter pattern with a light and shadow effect for a 3D look. It is equipped with multiple card slots, a bill compartment, and a zip coin pocket, offering a rich and practical interior design.
Model: 802023。
Size: 19.5*11*3cm。
Color: Dark Grey PVC/Original Leather。
